arts.ttl: Casemiro returns! Man United name team to face Tottenham
arts.sum: Casemiro has been recalled to the Manchester United team to face Tottenham Hotspur in the Premier League this afternoon. The Brazil international has not made a league appearance for the Red Devils in 2025, but returns amid several absentees in Ruben Amorim’s squad. 🚨 Presenting today’s United XI 👇#MUFC || #TOTMUN — Manchester United (@ManUtd) […] The post Casemiro returns! Man United name team to face Tottenham first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Team News: Chido Obi decision made as Man United confirm XI for Tottenham showdown in North London
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim confirms his starting XI for Sunday's Premier League clash with Tottenham Hotspur in North London.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Man United: Confirmed Lineups, Team News and Score Prediction
arts.sum: Manchester United face Tottenham in the Premier League’s Super Sunday showdown at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. Tottenham vs Man United Team News Tottenham could welcome back five players ...

arts.ttl: Jamie Redknapp destroys Tottenham owners with angry statement on Sky Sports
arts.sum: Chairman Daniel Levy's motives were questioned by former Tottenham midfielder Daniel Levy in astonishing critique of the club's management off the field before Man Utd clash

arts.ttl: Man United ‘make offer’ for Victor Osimhen as Ruben Amorim eyes elite striker
arts.sum: Manchester United have reportedly made a verbal offer to Victor Osimhen, with the Nigerian striker edging closer to a major career move. Osimhen has been lighting up the Turkish Super Lig with Galatasaray this season, despite a recent two-game goal drought. The 26-year-old has still managed to rack up an impressive 17 goals and five […] The post Man United ‘make offer’ for Victor Osimhen as Ruben Amorim eyes elite striker appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Manchester United chase Serie A top scorer
arts.sum: Arsenal have made contact with Atalanta over a potential deal to sign Mateo Retegui, with Manchester United also interested in the forward. Retegui has scored 20 goals in 22 league appearances for Atalanta this season, following his €28m move to the club from Genoa last summer. The Argentine-born Italy international is the leading scorer […] The post Arsenal and Manchester United chase Serie A top scorer first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Spurs confirmed team vs Man Utd as Maddison starts, Johnson and Odobert subs
arts.sum: Confirmed Tottenham XI: Vicario; Porro, Danso, Davies, Spence; Bentancur, Bergvall, Maddison; Kulusevski, Tel, Son. Ange Postecoglou has named his Tottenham Hotspur side to take on Manchester United in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford Barcelona transfer 'stance' emerges despite Aston Villa agreement with Man United
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is currently on loan at Aston Villa from Manchester United

Paul Pogba has slammed Manchester United for their treatment of Cristiano Ronaldo, branding the ex-Red Devil as the best striker in history. “ Cristiano Ronaldo has never been the problem,” said Pogba, who is currently a free agent and has even been linked with a return to United when his doping ban expires next month.

arts.ttl: Arsenal thrash Tottenham in north London derby
arts.sum: Chloe Kelly makes her debut in a second spell with the Gunners as Arsenal thrash Spurs 5-0 in the north London derby at the Emirates Stadium.
